---
title: "Verification Instructions Tracker"
subtitle: "Human and LLM feedback log for verification-step usefulness and reliability"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
---

## Purpose

Track which verification instructions are helpful, which fail, and which should be revised.
Use this file during verification runs to record step-level feedback and decisions.

## Update Rules

1. Add one row per issue or improvement request.
2. Include whether the issue came from a human verifier, an LLM verifier, or paired execution.
3. Mark a step as `SKIP` only when it is non-blocking for the selected run mode.
4. Keep unresolved items in the open table until the workbook is updated and re-tested.

## Status Legend

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| PASS | Step worked and was useful |
| FAIL | Step failed technically |
| SKIP | Step intentionally skipped for this run mode |
| DEFERRED | Improvement acknowledged but not yet implemented |

## Open Items

| Date | Step | Run Mode | Status | Helpful | Issue Summary | Decision / Next Action | Owner | Resolved |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [YYYY-MM-DD] | [Step ID and title] | [Human/LLM/Paired] | [FAIL/SKIP/DEFERRED] | [Yes/No] | [What failed or added friction?] | [Smallest accepted next action] | [Name] | No |

## Resolved Items

| Date Resolved | Step | Change Implemented | Verified By | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |  |
